# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take security vulnerabilities seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability within CharlieCut, please report it privately via [GitHub's "Report a vulnerability" feature](https://github.com/fabwinter/CharlieCut/security/advisories/new). All security vulnerabilities will be promptly addressed.

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

### What to include in your report

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fixes

### Response timeline

- We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours
- We will provide a detailed response within 5 business days
- We will keep you updated on our progress

Thank you for helping keep CharlieCut secure!
